page.title: From 1 to 100 in Quinfall
page.description: Quests run out at 50 — past that you live on town board dailies and party grinds. The right activity, zone and multiplier for every level bracket on a single page.

hero.title: Character Cap 100, Quests Up To 50
hero.subtitle: Maximum character level in Quinfall is 100. Quests dry up at level 50; after that the town board (×2 XP) and party-based elite mob hunts form the core progression loop.

phases.title: The Level Journey
phases.subtitle: Each phase is a different gameplay loop — match the phase to the right activity

tutorial.name: Tutorial & Start
tutorial.headline: Main story + pick your first weapon
tutorial.body: Clear the opening quest chain in the starter region. Try both weapon slots and lock in the family that suits you. Early gear comes from quest rewards — don't worry about the shop or crafting yet.

questCore.name: Core Quests
questCore.headline: Sweep side quests to keep the bar moving
questCore.body: Story + side combo levels you fast. Pick a first profession (gathering or mining) and farm passively while you travel. Your first dungeon runs land in this phase.

questLate.name: Late Quests
questLate.headline: Region change and dungeon focus
questLate.body: New regions of the map open up and quests start pointing at elite party targets. This is the first time you really upgrade your gear — collect Champion-mob enhancement materials.

townBoard.name: Town Board
townBoard.headline: ×2 XP loop — run it daily
townBoard.body: Quests are over, the board is open. Daily repeatable jobs at the town board grant ×2 XP. Party is mandatory: clear level-60 zones with a 3-person group while you cycle the board.

endgame.name: Endgame
endgame.headline: Elite mobs & world bosses
endgame.body: After 75 you need a full party. The 75 and 100 zones are the heart of the endgame loop: 26 distinct level-100 hunting fields, world boss rotations, open dungeons and set-piece farming.

xpSources.title: Where Does XP Come From?
xpSources.subtitle: Each activity has its own window and multiplier

storyQuest.name: Story Quest
storyQuest.body: The main chain is the most stable XP source through 1–50. The backbone of leveling.

sideQuest.name: Side Quest
sideQuest.body: Regional side quests fill story gaps and add gold and gear.

townBoard.name: Town Board
townBoard.body: Repeatable dailies at the town centre. The main XP faucet past 50 — ×2 multiplier active.

mobKill.name: Mob Kill
mobKill.body: Off-quest solo XP. Decent filler while you travel between quest hubs.

partyKill.name: Party Kill
partyKill.body: Elite mobs can't be soloed. Party play is mandatory past 50; per-player XP is +50% inside a group.

dungeonClear.name: Dungeon Clear
dungeonClear.body: A full dungeon clear is roughly an hour of solo grind worth of XP. Cycle daily once 25 unlocks instances.

worldBoss.name: World Boss
worldBoss.body: Daily spawn rotation. High participation XP and big drops. Ideal from 60+.

profession.name: Profession XP
profession.body: Each of the 13 professions has its own bar — independent of character level, but crafted gear speeds up your character climb.

zones.title: Where to Hunt at Each Level
zones.subtitle: All 54 zones with their real in-game names, party requirement and level bracket

mastery.title: Character Level + Weapon + Profession
mastery.subtitle: Quinfall has three independent progress bars — all running in parallel

weapon.name: Weapon Mastery
weapon.body: Every weapon family has its own skill tree and mastery level. Hitting with a weapon levels its mastery. You can keep two weapons equipped and feed both at once.

profession.name: Profession Level
profession.body: 13 professions: mining, gathering, fishing, hunting, lumber, smithing, tailoring, alchemy, cooking, carpentry, jewelry, mechanics, farming. Each is independent of character level.

character.name: Character Level
character.body: Max 100. Stat points, HP, MP, skill slots and gear-level gating all hang off this bar.

mistakes.title: 6 Traps to Avoid
mistakes.subtitle: Classic leveling pitfalls collected from community guides

soloPast50.name: Going solo past 50
soloPast50.body: Solo XP curve nearly stalls once quests dry up. Plug into a guild or party network early.

ignoringTownBoard.name: Ignoring the town board
ignoringTownBoard.body: Daily repeatables grant ×2 XP — even 30 minutes a day makes a huge difference.

wrongWeaponMastery.name: Levelling with the wrong weapon
wrongWeaponMastery.body: If you grind char-level with a weapon you won't main, your endgame mastery bar lags. Pick your main weapon early.

noProfessions.name: Skipping professions
noProfessions.body: Without 1-2 professions opened by level 20, you can't craft your own gear and you fall behind in the economy.

overgearing.name: Over-gearing trap
overgearing.body: Chasing level-50 gear at level 30 burns gold and slows you down. Stay inside your level band.

skipDungeons.name: Skipping dungeons
skipDungeons.body: Dungeon rewards offer daily XP quotas and rare gear pieces. Run the level-appropriate dungeon every day.
